tasks.title: Add AiSearchChatRequestSchema + SSE event schemas to @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Define Zod schemas in packages/schemas: AiSearchChatRequestSchema (messages[], currentFilters, locale, conversationId?) and the SSE event shapes (filters {params,intent}, token {delta}, done {conversationId}, error {code,message}). Single source of truth consumed by the route and the web SSE client. Tests: schema unit tests (valid/invalid payloads, optional conversationId, event discriminants) in the schemas test dir.

subtasks.title: SSE event schemas: filters / token / done / error

tasks.title: Extend DEFAULT_PROMPTS['search'] for conversational + injected-state framing
tasks.description: Extend the static slot-extraction contract in packages/ai-core/src/engine/default-prompts.ts so it supports the conversational framing: instruct the model to return the COMPLETE updated entity set, preserving prior filters unless the user changed them. Keep SPEC-199 single-shot extraction working. Tests: assert the new framing text is present and the existing search prompt contract is unchanged.

subtasks.title: Add conversational + full-updated-set framing to DEFAULT_PROMPTS['search']

tasks.title: Implement buildConversationalSearchPrompt in search-chat.prompt.ts
tasks.description: New apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-chat.prompt.ts exporting buildConversationalSearchPrompt({currentFilters, history, message, locale}). Injects serialized current filter set + bounded recent history + new message + locale-aware amenity allowlist (reuse SPEC-199's buildSearchIntentPrompt approach). Tests (write first): injects current filters correctly, bounds history to last N turns, includes the new message, asserts the full-updated-set contract via prompt shape.

subtasks.title: Inject current filters + bounded history + message + amenity allowlist
Unit tests (prompt shape, history bound, full-set contract)

tasks.title: Scaffold POST /api/v1/protected/ai/search-chat SSE route + middleware chain
tasks.description: New apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-chat.ts via createProtectedStreamingRoute: middleware chain auth (factory-injected) + entitlementMiddleware() (context only, no gate) + createAiRateLimitMiddlewares('search'). NO createAiQuotaMiddleware and NO entitlement gate: ai_search is a free platform feature (SPEC-211 7.7, D-7). Body validated by AiSearchChatRequestSchema (400 before stream opens). Handler is a T-004 scaffold (empty SSE + placeholder done); LLM logic is T-005/T-006/T-007. Registered in ai/protected barrel. Tests: 401 unauth, 400 invalid body, 429 rate-limit, 200 platform-free (user without entitlement is NOT rejected). 12 integration tests green (vitest e2e config).

subtasks.title: Wire auth + entitlementMiddleware (context) + rate-limit (no quota gate)

tasks.title: Wire generateObject -> mapIntentToSearchParams -> emit 'filters' SSE event
tasks.description: In the handler, call generateObject({feature:'search', prompt: buildConversationalSearchPrompt(...)}, SearchIntentOutputSchema), then mapIntentToSearchParams (+ slug->UUID resolution as SPEC-199 does), then emit the 'filters' SSE event with URL-ready params + extracted intent. Emit BEFORE the reply (D-9). Tests (stub provider): filters event emitted with correct shape; full-updated-set merge across a refinement.

tasks.title: Wire streamText reply -> 'token' events -> terminal 'done' with conversationId
tasks.description: After emitting filters, call streamText({feature:'search', messages:[...history, assistantContextWithFilters]}) and stream 'token' SSE events for the NL reply, ending with a terminal 'done' event carrying conversationId. Reply must NOT cite an exact result count (D-8). Tests (stub): tokens stream then done+conversationId; error event on provider failure.

tasks.title: Best-effort turn persistence to ai_conversations/ai_messages (feature='search')
tasks.description: Persist the turn best-effort reusing SPEC-200's persistChatTurn pattern with feature='search'. Failure is logged and non-fatal: the turn still emits filters, streams the reply, and returns done. Tests (stub): persistence called with feature='search'; a forced write failure does NOT break the SSE response.

subtasks.title: Integration test: write failure is non-fatal

tasks.title: Implement search-chat-stream.ts SSE client (web)
tasks.description: New apps/web/src/lib/api/search-chat-stream.ts adapted from ai-chat-stream.ts: opens the SSE connection to /ai/search-chat and emits parsed filters / token / done / error events to the caller. Tests: parser unit test for each event type and malformed-line handling.

tasks.title: Implement useSearchChat.ts hook (client-echo history + accumulated filters + per-turn lifecycle)
tasks.description: New apps/web/src/components/ai-search/useSearchChat.ts owning the message history (client echo), the accumulated filter set, and the per-turn lifecycle: send -> on 'filters' event call GET /api/v1/public/accommodations -> render -> stream reply. The AI route never executes the search. Tests: hook fires the accommodation search on the filters event; accumulates filters across turns.

tasks.title: Implement SearchChatPanel.client.tsx + module CSS
tasks.description: New apps/web/src/components/ai-search/SearchChatPanel.client.tsx (+ colocated *.module.css, vanilla CSS per web styling policy) adapted from AiChatWidget: renders the thread, the streamed reply, a 'pensando...' per-turn state, and the results grid INSIDE the panel. Tests: renders streamed tokens; renders results grid on filters event.

tasks.title: Active-filter chips (removable) reflecting the accumulated set
tasks.description: Render the accumulated filters as removable chips inside the panel (keep SPEC-199's IntentChips concept). Removing a chip re-runs the search without that filter. Tests: chips reflect the current set; removing a chip re-fires the search without that filter.

tasks.title: Mount SearchChatPanel on the listing; retire SPEC-199 single-input UI
tasks.description: Mount SearchChatPanel in apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/index.astro as THE 'search with AI' surface, and stop mounting / remove SPEC-199's single-input components (NlSearchInput, AiSearchPanel, AiSearchTrigger, old IntentChips). One AI search surface only. Tests: listing renders the chat panel and no longer renders the old input.

subtasks.title: Mount SearchChatPanel on the listing page
Test: chat panel present, old input absent

tasks.title: Retire the SPEC-199 search-intent route (consult owner before delete)
tasks.description: apps/api/src/routes/ai/protected/search-intent.ts is superseded by search-chat. Confirm no external consumer depends on it (consult owner per the spec's decision protocol), then delete the route and its registration; remove now-dead tests. If a consumer exists, keep it for back-compat and document why.

subtasks.title: Delete route + registration or document back-compat

tasks.title: API integration suite for /ai/search-chat (stub provider)
tasks.description: Consolidated integration suite using StubProvider: happy path (filters -> stream -> done+conversationId), auth (401), invalid body (400), rate limit (429), platform-free access (a user lacking ai_search entitlement is NOT rejected - no 403/quota gate per D-7), empty/garbage message handling, persistence best-effort (write failure non-fatal). Covers the 7 acceptance criteria at the API layer. NOTE: no quota/entitlement-gate tests - there is no such gate.

tasks.title: Web component + multi-turn refine test
tasks.description: Component test of SearchChatPanel + useSearchChat: renders streamed tokens, fires the accommodation search on the filters event, renders the results grid, shows removable active-filter chips, and a multi-turn refinement updates filters + results. Covers §7 at the web layer.

subtasks.title: Fires search on filters event + renders grid

tasks.title: E2E: type -> filters -> results -> refine -> results update
tasks.description: End-to-end happy flow on the listing: type a query, a filters event arrives, results render in-panel, the NL reply streams, a second refinement message updates filters and re-renders results. Covers the §7 first-turn + refinement scenarios end to end.

subtasks.title: First turn: type -> filters -> results -> reply

tasks.title: Local OpenAI-compatible provider regression guard
tasks.description: Regression test ensuring /ai/search-chat works against a local OpenAI-compatible provider: the output schema must not contain a date-regex that crashes the llama.cpp grammar compiler (cf. #1569). Guards the Ollama/local-provider path for generateObject.

subtasks.title: Assert schema has no grammar-breaking date-regex
generateObject works with local OpenAI-compatible provider

tasks.title: Docs: AI feature docs + SPEC-199 cross-reference + count trade-off
tasks.description: Update the AI feature docs to describe conversational search; cross-reference SPEC-199 (its single-input UI is superseded, mapper/schema/prompt live on); document the count-aware-reply trade-off (D-8) as a known future enhancement. No code.

subtasks.title: Document conversational search in AI docs
